ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Error: your browser does not support HTML canvas
ast.target: 错误：您的浏览器不支持 HTML canvas

ast.name: alert
ast.source: There is no last color to load...
ast.target: 没有上一个颜色可加载...

ast.name: error
ast.source: When using the icon shape, you need to define the code in the icon options object. This can be done per node or globally.
ast.target: 使用图标形状时，需要在图标选项对象中定义代码。这可以针对每个节点或全局设置。

ast.name: error
ast.source: NodeId provided for getConnectedEdges does not exist. Provided:
ast.target: 为 getConnectedEdges 提供的 NodeId 不存在。提供的值：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node id supplied to moveNode does not exist. Provided:
ast.target: 提供给 moveNode 的节点 ID 不存在。提供的值：

ast.name: error
ast.source: endPointOffset.from is not a valid number

ast.name: error
ast.source: endPointOffset.to is not a valid number

ast.name: error
ast.source: The stabilize method needs a numeric amount of iterations. Switching to default:
ast.target: 稳定方法需要数字类型的迭代次数。切换到默认值：

ast.name: error
ast.source: %cErrors have been found in the supplied options object.
ast.target: %c在提供的选项对象中发现了错误。

ast.name: info
ast.source: This network could not be positioned by this version of the improved layout algorithm. Please disable improvedLayout for better performance.
ast.target: 此版本的改进布局算法无法定位此网络。请禁用 improvedLayout 以获得更好的性能。

ast.name: info
ast.source: The clustering didn't succeed within the amount of interations allowed, progressing with partial result.
ast.target: 聚类在允许的迭代次数内未成功，将使用部分结果继续。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle arrow display on graph edges.
ast.target: 切换图边上箭头的显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the border around the graph container.
ast.target: 切换图容器周围的边框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle whether to display outgoing links in the graph.
ast.target: 切换是否在图中显示传出链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle whether to display backlinks in the graph.
ast.target: 切换是否在图中显示反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle whether to exclude image files from the graph.
ast.target: 切换是否从图中排除图像文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the initial zoom scale for the inline graph (default: 1.0).
ast.target: 设置内联图的初始缩放比例（默认值：1.0）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the shape of graph nodes.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the background color of graph nodes.
ast.target: 设置图节点的背景颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the font size of node labels (default: 14).
ast.target: 设置节点标签的字体大小（默认值：14）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shorten long node labels with ellipsis (...).
ast.target: 使用省略号 (...) 缩短长节点标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 截断前的最大字符数（默认值：20）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setLineDash is not supported in this browser. The dashed borders cannot be used.
ast.target: 此浏览器不支持setLineDash。无法使用虚线边框。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setLineDash is not supported in this browser. The dashed stroke cannot be used.
ast.target: 此浏览器不支持setLineDash。无法使用虚线描边。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The selfReferenceSize property has been deprecated. Please use selfReference property instead. The selfReference can be set like thise selfReference:{size:30, angle:Math.PI / 4}
ast.target: selfReferenceSize属性已弃用。请改用selfReference属性。selfReference可以这样设置：selfReference:{size:30, angle:Math.PI / 4}

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The dot property has been deprecated. Please use the static convertDot method to convert DOT into vis.network format and use the normal data format with nodes and edges. This converter is used like this: var data = vis.network.convertDot(dotString);
ast.target: dot属性已弃用。请使用静态convertDot方法将DOT转换为vis.network格式，并使用包含节点和边的普通数据格式。此转换器的使用方法如下：var data = vis.network.convertDot(dotString);

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The gephi property has been deprecated. Please use the static convertGephi method to convert gephi into vis.network format and use the normal data format with nodes and edges. This converter is used like this: var data = vis.network.convertGephi(gephiJson);
ast.target: gephi属性已弃用。请使用静态convertGephi方法将gephi转换为vis.network格式，并使用包含节点和边的普通数据格式。此转换器的使用方法如下：var data = vis.network.convertGephi(gephiJson);

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Deprecated: Please use editNode instead of editNodeMode.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error: plugin settings could not be loaded. Please try reloading the plugin.
ast.target: 错误：无法加载插件设置。请尝试重新加载插件。
